title: calamagrostis gayana
intro: Calamagrostis gayana, also known as the Mountain Fescue, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Calamagrostis gayana include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Calamagrostis gayana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
